# Upstream snapshot — DO NOT EDIT

This directory contains a read-only reference snapshot of upstream
[MangoFVTT/fvtt-ready-set-roll-5e](https://github.com/MangoFVTT/fvtt-ready-set-roll-5e)
at version **3.5.0**, retrieved on **2026-04-17**.

## Why it's kept

- Reference for diffing against upstream when cherry-picking future fixes.
- Provenance trail: shows exactly what state the fork was based on, before
  any RSReforged changes were applied.
- Convenience: lets contributors compare a current source file to its
  pre-fork ancestor without cloning upstream.

## Rules

- **Do not edit anything in this directory.** All RSReforged work happens
  at the repo root.
- If/when the snapshot is refreshed against a newer upstream version,
  bump the version number in this file and the directory name in lockstep
  (e.g. `docs/upstream-3.6.0-snapshot/`).

## Upstream license

GPL-3.0. The same license applies to RSReforged (it must, by inheritance).
See [`LICENSE`](../../LICENSE) at the repo root.
